sourceSummary.oneLine: Harness-related wiring and work text for soldering, shrink tube finishing, pin assignments, and NC cutting references.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as traceable DHF harness/electrical design evidence for connector signal, wire color, VCC/GND, NC cutting, and shrink tube work details.
keyPoints: Text states soldering followed by shrink tube work: "납땜 후 수축튜브 작업".
Text identifies parts or suppliers including "10226-R21TS (3M)" and "12507HS-25L(연호전자)".
Pin/wire listings include TRXP/TRXN signals, OUT_EXP_REQ/ACK signals, VCC, GND, and NC entries.
Several NC entries are marked "NC (Cutting) 작업 이미지 참조".

evidence.claim: The source is associated with a DHF harness electrical design file AD0-000003.pdf.
The document includes soldering followed by shrink tube work.
The document references part 12507HS-25L from 연호전자.
The wiring list includes TRXP/TRXN differential-style signal names with wire colors.
